installation_requirements.layout_configuration: 3 Mohawk A-7 lifts in narrow bay configuration
installation_requirements.post_sharing: Posts 2&3 shared between Bay 1 and Bay 2; Posts 4&5 shared between Bay 2 and Bay 3
installation_requirements.vehicle_orientation: Bay 1: car rear toward door; Bay 2: car front toward door (backed in); Bay 3: car rear toward door

specifications.layout_type: Plan (top) view of cars on lift

features: 3-bay narrow layout with Mohawk A-7 lifts
Shared post configuration to minimize space
Space for work bench, brake lathe, and tire changer along back wall
safety_features: Arms of Bay 1 will not touch lift in Bay 2, nor Bay 2 to Bay 3
notes: Vehicles shown are 18 ft 5 inches long
Arms of Bay 1 will not touch lift in Bay 2 nor 2 to 3
Plan (top) view of cars on lift shown
Layout includes work bench, brake lathe, and tire changer along back wall
